name: Christine R. Sarmiento
background: Nurse and operations manager. Mother who worked full time while attending college.
statement: I am running for Governor of California to deliver competent, accountable leadership focused on results. As a nurse and operations manager, I've worked in high-pressure environments where errors have real consequences and accountability matters. I'm also a mother who worked full time while attending college—so I understand stress, sacrifice, and responsibility firsthand. California's challenges are practical, not abstract. Affordability, public safety, access to healthcare, education, and infrastructure reliability affect families every day. The system isn't broken, it's ill. With proper steps we can make it a little better every day, and we will be well. I ask for your consideration and your trust to help move California forward.

contact.address: 3100 Big Dalton Ave., Ste. 170-336, Baldwin Park, CA 91706
